displayTitle: Silent at the Station, Loud at the End

beats.narration: You know the front half of penetrant. Now run it like a working shift, and learn to read a miss backward to the step that caused it.

payload.title: RUN THE LINE
payload.sub: Every processing error is silent when it happens, loud at evaluation.
payload.panelLabel: PT // A MISS HIDES ITS CAUSE

beats.narration: The order is fixed: each step sets up the next. Pre-clean so flaws open, verify light, dwell so they fill, remove so they stay loaded.
Two jobs, same physics. A field valve body, solvent and visible dye. A casting rack on a fluorescent water-washable line. Verify first; stop the wash at background.
Now diagnose backward. A clean blank means a sealed flaw. Faint indications mean dwell drifted. Heavy glow means removal never finished.

payload.heading: Read the symptom back to the station

beats.narration: So lock it in. Verify before you process, watch while it runs, stop at the endpoint, and write down what you measured.

payload.sub: You cannot inspect quality in at the end of the line.
